name: teamwork-skill
description: Claude Code adapter skills for evidence-grounded research, debugging, planning, execution, review, and long-running goals.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-grounded teamwork for complex Claude Code tasks.
interface.longDescription: A Claude Code adapter for research, reproducible debugging, reviewable planning, scoped execution, fresh review, and long-running goals. Simple work stays on the native fast path; Task subagents are used only when independent work benefits from separation. Claude Code remains in control of editing, tools, permissions, and interaction.
defaultPrompt: Research this problem from primary sources and project evidence, then recommend the next safe action.
Execute the accepted scope, verify the result, and report any genuine blocker.
Initialize or refresh Teamwork for one selected repository without changing unrelated user or project configuration.
